SoldierPartner.10201.2: Grants 1 stack of Wet Mist each time, up to 5 stacks
SoldierPartner.10202.2:
Applies 2 stacks of Wet Mist each time, up to 10 stacks. At 10 stacks, Wet Mist is converted into 1 stack of Condensation.
- Condensation: Stuns the target, increasing <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_DmgPlusRcd" tint></color> DMG taken by 50% for 5s.
SoldierPartner.10401.2: Applies 1 stack of Sanction Mark, up to 2 stacks.
SoldierPartner.10402.2: Applies 1 stack of Sanction Mark, up to 3 stacks.
SoldierPartner.10403.2:
Applies 1 stack of Reckoning Mark, up to 5 stacks.
Upon reaching 5 stacks, all marks detonate immediately, causing the target to lose HP equal to 10× the DMG of a single stack, and removing all Reckoning Marks from the target.
SoldierPartner.10502.2:
5% <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_SkillDmg" tint></color>, 20% <color=#f98037><sprite name="Soldier_00_PartnerAttr_RecoveryEnergy" tint></color>
Whenever a Gear Spinner piece casts a skill, 1 random Offense piece gains Neo Shield, up to 1 stack.
For every 3 skills cast by Gear Spinner pieces in Assist Slots, triggers Neo Charge once.
Neo Shield: A shield equal to 5% of own Max HP for 6s.
Neo Charge: Restores 3% of Max HP to all pieces.
